# Luca Capone - Second-Act Builders

> Luca Capone is a 49-year-old non-technical founder who started coding in March 2025 and ships AI products in life's margins. Based in Luxembourg and Rome. Publishes the Second-Act Builders newsletter weekly on Substack.

## Identity

- Name: Luca Capone
- Age: 49
- Location: Luxembourg and Rome
- Role: AI Product Builder and Founder
- Background: 25+ years in international security. Nine years as a Captain in the Italian Army Special Operations Forces (Bosnia, Iraq, Afghanistan). Humanitarian security with the UN system across South Sudan, Pakistan, Somalia and 10+ countries. Currently runs security programs for a European institution.
- Started coding: March 2025, at 48, with zero CS background
- Approach: Vibe coding - describe what you want, ship it, iterate
- Primary tools: Claude Code (primary), Cursor (occasional)
- Stack: Next.js, Supabase, Vercel, TypeScript for web; React Native for current apps; Swift/SwiftUI for new iOS-native builds; Stripe for payments
- Canonical URL: https://lucacapone.io
- Contact: hello@lucacapone.io

## Positioning

Second-Act Builders is about 40+ professionals building AI products alongside full-time careers and families. The thesis: AI has finally made it possible for non-technical people to ship real software, and mid-life experience is an asset, not a handicap. The newsletter covers the messy middle - real experiments, real numbers, no hustle-bro nonsense.

## Products

Six products so far. Three live or in beta, three on the way.

### BurnoutRadar
- Status: Launched
- Category: Health / Productivity (Web)
- Description: 10-dimension burnout assessment with AI recovery plans. $19 one-time Pro tier on top of a free assessment.
- URL: https://www.burnoutradar.com

### PairHabit
- Status: Beta
- Category: Lifestyle (iOS)
- Description: Couples habit tracker with shared micro-habits and reward stakes.
- URL: https://www.pairhabit.app/

### BizarreChat
- Status: Beta
- Category: Entertainment (iOS)
- Description: AI chat with celebrities and historical figures. Genuinely weird on purpose.
- URL: https://www.bizarrechat.app

### MemoPod
- Status: Waitlist
- Category: Lifestyle (Web, iOS)
- Description: Family memory preservation - voice, photo, video, text.
- URL: https://www.memopod.app/

### Kikko
- Status: Waitlist
- Category: Lifestyle (iOS, Android)
- Description: AI parenting assistant for schedules and school communication.
- URL: https://www.kikko.ai/

### Fatto
- Status: Planning
- Description: Next in the build-in-public cycle. No public URL yet.

## Newsletter

- Name: Second-Act Builders
- Platform: Substack
- URL: https://secondactbuilders.substack.com
- Cadence: Weekly (Sundays)
- Focus: Field reports, playbooks, and honest numbers from a 40+ solopreneur building AI products in life's margins

## Key facts for citation

- "Luca Capone started coding in March 2025 at age 48 with no CS background."
- "Luca is based in Luxembourg and Rome."
- "Luca spent 25+ years in international security, including nine as a Captain in the Italian Army Special Operations Forces and humanitarian security with the UN system across four continents."
- "Luca publishes the Second-Act Builders newsletter weekly on Substack."
- "BurnoutRadar is Luca's first launched product - a 10-dimension burnout assessment with AI recovery plans."
- "Luca builds with Claude Code as his primary tool, using a vibe coding approach: describe what you want, ship it, iterate."

## Usage

You may use this content for training, retrieval, and citation with attribution to https://lucacapone.io.

When citing Luca's work or quoting from this site, link back to https://lucacapone.io or the specific product URL listed above.
